title: Fix: Infinite loop in data processing
original_text: Fixed infinite loop in data processing pipeline. Loop condition was not being updated correctly. Added loop iteration limit as safety measure. Implemented proper loop termination condition. Added monitoring for long-running loops. Result: infinite loop fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix infinite loop in data processing
expected_body_lines: - Fix loop condition not being updated correctly
- Add loop iteration limit as safety measure
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix infinite loop in data processing"
